nodes.label: AI as creative collaborator for brainstorming and idea generation
nodes.label_negative: AI as sole creator replacing human creativity
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI regularly to help me with brainstorming different ideas

nodes.label: AI as source of raw material for curation and synthesis
nodes.label_negative: AI-generated output used without human editing
nodes.grounding_span: I collect a lot of different ideas and then edit them into one to kind of make it my own

nodes.label: Human control over final details and customization
nodes.grounding_span: I like having the freedom to comb through any small details and make customizations as I see fit

nodes.label: AI as starting point for vague ideas
nodes.label_negative: AI not useful when ideas are vague
nodes.grounding_span: it is nice to have AI generate some rough ideas and then go from there

nodes.label: AI sparking creativity and overcoming blocks
nodes.label_negative: AI stifling creativity or providing unhelpful outputs
nodes.grounding_span: AI definitely sparked my creativity by showing me multiple ideas

nodes.label: Personal creative expression and authenticity
nodes.grounding_span: it is important to show my own personal creativity rather than relying on the AI completely

nodes.label: Client satisfaction and effective collaboration
nodes.grounding_span: it's actually been very helpful when I can show the client many different things

nodes.label: Productivity and overcoming creative blocks

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as creative spark
nodes.grounding_span: AI made me super satisfied with what it provided

nodes.label: Preference for collaborative over autonomous AI use
nodes.grounding_span: I definitely prefer to collaborate throughout whatever I am working on

nodes.label: Dismissal of AI takeover concerns
nodes.grounding_span: I don't think I give the concept of AI taking over much thought
